scripts.executa:mock: anna-app executa dev --dir executas/mini-notes-summary-python --mock-sampling fixtures/sampling-summary.jsonl --invoke summarize_notes --args "{\"notes\":[{\"id\":\"n1\",\"order\":1,\"content\":\"明天跟客户 follow up\"},{\"id\":\"n2\",\"order\":2,\"content\":\"修复登录 bug\"},{\"id\":\"n3\",\"order\":3,\"content\":\"准备 Workshop 内容\"}]}"
scripts.test:executa: uv run --python 3.12 --with pytest python -m pytest executas/mini-notes-summary-python/tests -v
scripts.test:sanitize: uv run --python 3.12 --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_sanitize_ui_rpc_log.py -v
